name: NetBox - Tenant by Prefix (contains endpoint IP)
description: Resolve the tenant that owns the prefix containing the endpoint's IP. GET NetBox /api/ipam/prefixes/?contains=<ip> and extract the owning tenant (slug/id/name) + matching prefix + status into Authorization attributes. Use NetBox_Tenant_Slug in an Enforcement Policy condition for a per-tenant policy decision. Preferred when endpoints are not individually registered in NetBox but their prefix is assigned to a tenant. One HTTP call. Replace NETBOX_HOST and NETBOX_API_TOKEN.

name: NetBox - Tenant by IP (exact address)
description: Resolve the tenant directly assigned to the endpoint's IP address object. GET NetBox /api/ipam/ip-addresses/?address=<ip> and extract tenant (slug/id/name) + address + status. Use only when individual IP-address objects are registered in NetBox with a tenant; otherwise prefer the prefix-contains CSA above. One HTTP call. Replace NETBOX_HOST and NETBOX_API_TOKEN. Note: NetBox's address filter is an exact match (incl. mask) — if the framed IP is bare, append /32 (IPv4) or /128 (IPv6).
